population: N-of-1 clinical methods; no athlete population
intervention: CENT 2015 explanation and elaboration for prospectively planned N-of-1 trials
comparator: Incomplete or retrospectively reconstructed period-level reporting
component_dose: Pre-specify interventions outcomes periods sequence stopping rules and analysis; exact dose is design-specific
component_order: Pre-specified randomized or otherwise justified period sequence
separation_hours: Design-specific washout or separation must address carryover
actual_interval_hours: Design-specific period duration; no universal interval
outcome_measure: Period-level intervention delivery outcomes harms withdrawals protocol deviations and missing data
instrument_protocol: CENT 2015 explanation and elaboration; companion reporting guidance
missingness: Report period-level missingness attrition and protocol deviations
adverse_events: Report harms for each intervention period
uncertainty: Carryover irreversibility period effects and measurement error remain design constraints
limitations: Reporting guidance does not validate ABAB or crossover for cumulative training adaptation and supplies no universal baseline count freshness threshold efficacy safety or 9.5-day scientific superiority

population: General physical-activity populations and wearable-device validation settings
intervention: Framework for validating consumer wearable-derived physical-activity measures
comparator: Criterion or reference method appropriate to the device output and intended use
component_dose: Validation dimensions include device placement wear protocol processing and metric-specific error; universal dose NOT_APPLICABLE
outcome_measure: Accuracy precision reliability and validity of wearable-derived measures
instrument_protocol: Device-specific protocol criterion measure placement firmware or algorithm and processing details must remain identifiable
time_points: Repeated or cross-sectional validation points as required by the metric
missingness: Missing or changed device method algorithm placement or wear-time information blocks longitudinal equivalence
effect_estimate: METHOD_GUIDANCE_ONLY; device validity and error must precede athlete-level change interpretation
uncertainty: Validity and error are device population behavior and protocol specific
limitations: Full-text methods guidance rather than an athlete intervention; no youth middle-distance validation no universal device equivalence and no recovery readiness safety or automatic-prescription authority

population: Team-sport athletes; mainly adult and elite; mixed sex; not distance runners
intervention: Systematic review of single-item self-report wellbeing measures
comparator: Associations with training load or objective performance and available measurement-property evidence
component_dose: Single items for constructs such as fatigue sleep quality stress soreness and mood; scales and administration protocols varied
outcome_measure: Relationships between single-item wellbeing responses training load and performance plus reliability and validity evidence
instrument_protocol: Study-specific single-item scales timing wording and anchors; protocols were heterogeneous
missingness: Heterogeneous reporting and incomplete measurement-property evidence across included studies
effect_estimate: Relationships with load and performance were inconsistent; evidence did not support collapsing items into one validated fatigue score
uncertainty: Review heterogeneity and weak or incomplete measurement-property evidence limit certainty
individual_response: Individual response patterns were not established as a universal decision rule
limitations: Team-sport indirectness heterogeneous constructs protocols and populations; no youth runner-specific validation no causal readiness or injury inference and no authority for a total-fatigue score or 9.5-day safety claim

intervention: Cochrane guidance for summary-of-findings tables and certainty assessment
comparator: Unstructured certainty language without explicit domains or outcome-specific judgments
component_dose: Outcome-specific certainty appraisal across risk of bias inconsistency indirectness imprecision publication bias and applicable upgrading considerations
outcome_measure: Outcome-specific certainty and reasons for rating decisions
instrument_protocol: Cochrane Handbook chapter 14 and GRADE framework
missingness: Unavailable studies inaccessible full text and missing outcome data must remain visible in certainty judgments
adverse_events: Adverse outcomes require their own outcome-specific appraisal when reported
uncertainty: Certainty may differ by outcome; imprecision inconsistency indirectness and bias require explicit judgment
limitations: Generic review guidance does not supply athlete-specific transfer efficacy safety minimum n freshness thresholds or automated-prescription authority; adolescent 800 and 1500 m population and 9.5-day intervention directness must be judged separately

population: US HIPAA covered-entity context; no athlete population
intervention: HIPAA de-identification through Expert Determination or Safe Harbor
comparator: Disclosure of protected health information without an applicable privacy basis or de-identification method
component_dose: Safe Harbor identifier removal and absence-of-actual-knowledge condition or qualified expert determination with documented methods and results
outcome_measure: Identifiability and residual re-identification risk in released health information
instrument_protocol: Official HHS OCR guidance under the US HIPAA Privacy Rule
missingness: Missing jurisdiction purpose recipient data-field and de-identification-method facts prevent treating a release as safely de-identified
adverse_events: PRIVACY_HARM_REMAINS_POSSIBLE; not a clinical adverse-event estimate
effect_estimate: GUIDANCE_ONLY; de-identification reduces but does not eliminate re-identification risk
uncertainty: Expert Determination is context-specific and Safe Harbor is rule-specific; neither proves zero risk
limitations: US HIPAA guidance is not a universal global privacy rule and does not itself authorize collection analysis sharing or coach access; private notes remain zero-signal and product consent purpose limitation and jurisdictional review remain separate
